*�����������������fIn the Particle POP...

To Initialize a particle system at its initial state, press Initialize. You can usually set Pre-Roll to run it a few seconds to get it primed.

To start a particle System, press Start.

To end it, press Go to Done.

The Force POP's various force types:

A versatile particle force generator that can blend radial, axial, and spiral forces in any combination. Create everything from gentle gravitational wells to chaotic vortexes by mixing inward/outward radial pulls, directional streams, and rotational spirals. Each force component can be independently enabled, rotated, and tuned with customizable falloff curves. Perfect for simulating complex natural phenomena like tornadoes, magnetic fields, or abstract energy flows where multiple force types need to work together seamlessly. Use the specification POP to create complex arrays of forces.
